message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". For question 1: "Chapters". Evaluate if text lists main sections of thesis. The text says: "Bachelor’s work structure: Šis darbs ir sadalīts divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Teorētiskā daļa sniedz šī darba kontekstu. Tās saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās. Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

So it lists main sections: two main parts: theoretical and practical. Then theoretical part has three subparts. But it doesn't mention practical part's subparts. So partially. For question 1: does it list main sections? It lists two main parts but not the practical part's content. So partially but not fully. So "complies": false. Feedback: mention missing practical part description.

Question 2: Description: does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes theoretical part's three subparts. It doesn't describe practical part. So partially. So "complies": false. Feedback: mention missing description of practical part.

Question 3: Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It gives some but not full. Might be somewhat understandable but incomplete. So "complies": false. Feedback: mention incomplete clarity.

Thus produce array of 3 objects. Ensure keys correct. Provide "question" values exactly "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback text. Provide boolean.
